matches.match_rationale: The core pain is receiving budget submissions in heterogeneous formats and having to manually rekey and normalize them into a single network-level structure.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An AI-assisted ingestion layer that accepts budget submissions in any format and automatically maps columns/line items to the canonical chart of accounts.

matches.match_rationale: Once submissions are ingested, the pain manifests as duplicate/inconsistent line items and reconciliation errors. Anomaly detection can automatically flag budget line items that deviate from historical patterns.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A post-ingestion validation layer that scores each site submission for statistical anomalies and routes flagged items to finance staff.

matches.match_rationale: The full consolidation workflow — chasing late submissions, parsing incoming files, normalizing formats, running validation checks, escalating exceptions, and assembling the network view — is a multi-step process that maps directly to task automation.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An end-to-end budget consolidation agent that monitors an intake folder, triggers transformation and anomaly checks on each submission, sends targeted exception queries back to site principals, and assembles a consolidated draft.

matches.match_rationale: Low-financial-literacy principals submit late or incomplete because they don't know what's expected. AI text generation can produce plain-language submission guides and draft targeted exception explanations.
matches.opportunity_sketch: Automated, context-aware email drafts sent to principals when their submission is late, incomplete, or flagged — written in plain language referencing their specific numbers.
